drawn.ability: +1 Rep per evolution after this one

data.note: Base income 2, no babies/evolved/facilities yet. Capped at existing 2.

Random roll 5 = adopt + buy cheap card. Adopted Togepi from meadow (free), bought Poke Ball Rattle for 1 token. No cards tucked (no matching icons efficiently). Hand had 4 Gentle Touch + 1 Rattle Toy.
Tucked 3 cards under Togepi: Rattle Toy (Toy), 2x Gentle Touch (as Song). Togepi needs Song 2, Berry 1, Toy 1. Now has 3/4 icons.

drawn.ability: All Song cards provide +1 Song icon

data.note: Random roll 1 = adopt first available + tuck + buy cheap. Adopted Chingling (hard pick for random), tucked Soothing Lullaby + Gentle Touch (as Song). Bought Potion Drops for 1 token.

data.hand: 3 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Poke Ball Rattle (reshuffled discard)
data.evolution: Togepi evolves to Togetic! Rep +5. Tucked cards discarded.
data.note: Income 3 (base 2 + 1 baby). Drew 5 after reshuffle. Tucked Berry Snack completing Togepi (4/4). EVOLUTION! Togetic grants +1 Rep per future evolution.

drawn.ability: Once/Day: peek at top 2 deck cards, keep 1

data.hand: Reshuffle: 2 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Rattle Toy, 1 Potion Drops
data.note: Chingling at 4/5. Just needs 1 Medicine. Bought Full Restore for future use.

data.hand: 2 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Soothing Lullaby, 1 Sitrus Berry

actions.note: Togepi evolved, crib empty, adopt Cleffa (3-icon Song-heavy, easy)

data.evolution: Cleffa evolves to Clefairy! Rep +3 (+1 from Togetic) = +4. Total rep: 9.
data.note: Adopted Cleffa and evolved same turn! 3-icon baby fully satisfied by hand. Togetic bonus kicks in. Random P1 getting lucky with easy babies.

data.hand: Reshuffle: 3 Gentle Touch, 1 Soothing Lullaby, 1 Full Restore
data.evolution: Chingling evolves to Chimecho! Rep +6. Total rep: 6.
data.note: Finally evolved Chingling after 3 Days of feeding. 5-icon baby gives big payoff (6 rep) but took much longer. Chimecho ability: all Song cards +1 Song icon.
Another same-turn evolution! 3-icon baby again. P1 snowballing with Togetic bonus. Income now strong at 5 (base 2 + 3 evolved).
data.hand: Poke Ball Rattle, Sitrus Berry, Potion Drops, 2 Gentle Touch
data.evolution: Elekid evolves to Electabuzz! Rep +3 (+1 Togetic) = +4. Total rep: 13.

drawn.ability: Copy 1 other evolved Pokemon's ability each Day

data.hand: 2 Gentle Touch, 1 Berry Snack, 1 Rattle Toy, 1 Potion Drops

actions.note: Random picks available meadow baby - Mime Jr. is 5-icon, tough again

data.note: Random P2 adopts another 5-icon baby. Tucked 2 Toy icons. Bought Substitute Plush (3 Toy) for future. Still only 1 evolution.
No baby in meadow to adopt (random check). P1 spends tokens on deck building. 3 market purchases. No evolution this turn.
data.hand: Sitrus Berry, Clefairy Doll, Berry Snack, 2 Gentle Touch
Substitute Plush, Full Restore, Soothing Lullaby, 2 Gentle Touch
data.evolution: Mime Jr. evolves to Mr. Mime! Rep +6. Total P2 rep: 12.
data.note: Nurture Burst on 3 Toy icons! Substitute Plush is powerful. Mime Jr. finally evolved after 2 days of nurturing. Mr. Mime can copy abilities.

data.hand: Jigglypuff's Melody, Herbal Compress, Potion Drops, Gentle Touch, Hummed Tune
data.note: Adopted Magby, got 3/4 Medicine icons from hand. Needs 1 Toy. Herbal Compress draw bonus useful.

data.hand: 2 Gentle Touch, Berry Snack, Potion Drops, Rattle Toy
data.note: P2 adopts new baby, buys strong Medicine card for future. No evolution this turn. Building deck.

drawn.ability: +1 Berry icon to all Berry cards

data.hand: Clefairy Doll, Gentle Touch, Rattle Toy, Berry Snack, Full Restore
data.evolution: Magby evolves to Magmar! Rep +4 (+1 Togetic) = +5. Total P1 rep: 18.
data.note: Magby evolved (4th for P1). Adopted Budew and immediately got 2/3 icons. One more Song needed.

data.hand: Healing Pulse, Gentle Touch, Soothing Lullaby, Oran Berry, Substitute Plush

actions.note: P2 had adopted Pichu on Day 6 (correcting: meadow had Pichu). Actually P2 adopted Igglybuff from meadow

data.evolution: Igglybuff evolves to Jigglypuff! Rep +3. P2 total: 15.
data.note: P2 evolved Igglybuff (3-icon baby, easy). 7/8 total evolutions. Substitute Plush overkill but Nurture Burst triggered.

data.hand: Hummed Tune, Soothing Lullaby, Sitrus Berry, Gentle Touch, Jigglypuff's Melody
data.evolution: Budew evolves to Roselia! Rep +3 (+1 Togetic) = +4. P1 total: 22.
data.note: 8th evolution triggers endgame! Finish current Week (P2 gets Day 8) + 1 final Week (Days 9-10, both players).

data.hand: Full Restore, Berry Snack, Rattle Toy, Potion Drops, Gentle Touch

actions.note: Rattle Toy is Toy type, cannot declare as Song. Use Gentle Touch instead.

data.note: P2 adopts Smoochum, gets 2/3 Medicine. Needs 1 Song next turn.

data.P1_actions: Adopted Pichu, tucked Clefairy Doll (2 Toy) + Soothing Lullaby (Song). Pichu evolved! Rep +4 (+1 Togetic) = +5. P1 rep: 27.
data.P2_actions: Tucked Soothing Lullaby under Smoochum (Song 1). Smoochum evolved to Jynx! Rep +3. P2 rep: 18. Bought Lum Berry Feast.
data.day10_P1: Adopted Azurill, tucked Berry Snack (Berry) + 2 Gentle Touch (Toy, Toy). Azurill evolved! Rep +3 (+1 Togetic) = +4. P1 rep: 31.
data.day10_P2: Adopted Budew-like baby from meadow. Tucked 2 cards, 2/3 progress. No evolution. P2 rep: 18. Bought facility Berry Garden (2 tokens, +1 rep).
data.note: Final Week complete. P1 dominant with Togetic snowball. P2 hampered by early hard babies.
